MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Colin Munro, Archer Norris, (925) 930-6600, for Defendant and Moving Party Theodore and Mary Arbuckle
Frederick J. Northrop, Esq., Last & Faoro, (650) 696-8350, for Defendant Alexander Liverant
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COUNSEL PRESENTED VALID PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT AND REPRESENTED THAT THE PLAINTIFFS WOULDN'T BE APPEARING AT TODAY'S HEARING. IN LIGHT OF VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AND ABSENCE OF OPPOSITION, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
